name: Tiger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking soda, and salt; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs and vanilla; beat well.
4. Add the flour mixture, mixing until well combined.
5. Stir in crushed cereal.
6. Drizzle melted chocolate over dough.
7. With a knife, swirl the melted chocolate gently through the dough to achieve a marbled appearance.
8. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 350°F for about 12 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. Remove immediately from baking sheets and cool on wire racks.
